$comment: Stylelint config for web-design-pipeline. Enforces design-token discipline: all colors, spacing, typography, and timing values should flow through CSS custom properties defined in :root, not raw literals scattered across component styles.

selector-id-pattern.message: ID selectors should not be used for styling — use BEM class selectors instead

custom-property-pattern.message: Custom properties should follow the design-token naming convention: --{category}-{name} (e.g., --color-bg-base, --spacing-md, --font-size-lg)
